scripts.build: pnpm --filter @hesper/shared build && pnpm --filter @hesper/persistence build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @hesper/shared build && pnpm --filter @hesper/persistence build && tsc -p tsconfig.typecheck.json --noEmit
